rationale: The only linkage evidence is a DOI-level matched reference (10.1509/jmkr.45.6.741) with no in-text citation context, so we cannot see how it is used in the 2024 paper. Conceptually, the cited article is about customer–firm affection and staff relationship transfer in service loyalty, while the citing paper studies point-redemption under fixed vs. variable exchange rates and optimism; overlap appears broad ("loyalty") rather than clearly methodological or mechanistic.
